ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather record */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Number of records for the specific hour */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Actual temperature recorded */,
  "temperature_feeling" REAL /* Perceived temperature (feels like) */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity percentage */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed in km/h */,
  "weather_code" INTEGER /* Weather code representing specific weather conditions */,
  "is_holiday" INTEGER /* Indicates if the day is a holiday */,
  "is_weekend" INTEGER /* Indicates if the day is a weekend */,
  "season" INTEGER /* Season identifier (e.g., 1 for Winter, 2 for Spring, etc.) */,
  "hour" INTEGER /* Hour of the day (0-23) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the weather record */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "weather_station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_season FOREIGN KEY ("season") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_weather_code FOREIGN KEY ("weather_code") REFERENCES weather_codes ("code_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_weather_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("weather_station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("weather_station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_is_holiday FOREIGN KEY ("is_holiday") REFERENCES holidays ("holiday_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the event */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the event */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the event is held */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event */,
  "expected_attendance" INTEGER /* Expected number of attendees */,
  "event_status" TEXT /* Status of the event (e.g., scheduled, cancelled, completed) */,
  "revenue_generated" REAL /* Revenue generated by the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_weather_impact" (
  "impact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the impact record */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather record */,
  "impact_level" TEXT /* Level of impact (e.g., Low, Medium, High) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of how the weather impacted the event */,
  "cost_impact" REAL /* Monetary cost of the impact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("impact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_weather_impact_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_weather_impact_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "holidays" (
  "holiday_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each holiday */,
  "holiday_name" TEXT /* Name of the holiday */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the holiday */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the holiday */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("holiday_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_codes" (
  "code_id" INTEGER /* Weather code */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the weather condition */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the weather code (e.g., clear, cloudy, rainy) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("code_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., client, analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather record being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "query_parameters" TEXT /* Query parameters used for filtering or sorting data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_attendance" (
  "attendance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendance record */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "actual_attendance" INTEGER /* Actual number of attendees */,
  "attendance_rate" REAL /* Attendance rate (percentage of expected attendance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_attendance_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_stations" (
  "weather_station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the weather station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the weather station */,
  "altitude" REAL /* Altitude of the weather station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_types" (
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event type */,
  "event_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the event type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_weather_station" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event */,
  "weather_station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id", "weather_station_id")
)
